channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: The tree trunk has grown many suckers reducing visibility and blocking pavement, 9th June
item.description:
On the frontage of 157 Gloucester Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 190, Gloucester Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in singletrack driving line, 9th June
item.description:
Approx halfway down the narrow portion of Green St. Has been repaired badly and has become even worse than before.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 5, 9th June
item.description:
Medium hole by kerb outside number 5. Not the one outside number 6.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Arle Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 53, 9th June
item.description:
Several potholes outside house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Arle Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 64, 9th June
item.description:
The hole is near the end of the driveway and normally has a car parked over it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Arle Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction, 9th June
item.description:
Right of way that ran through Swindon Farm to the side of Gallagher retail park is still obstructed by building materials from the Persimmon development. As no further work can be undertaken on this site until junction 10 is completed 2028/2029 shouldn’t this right of way be opened up again?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1A-1B, Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pitville park trampolines, 9th June
item.description:
Tear appearing in the rubber on the trampolines

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree and roots being undermined possibly by rats, 9th June
item.description:
Tree located outside 50 Welland Lodge Road GL52 3HQ. Only noticed today when cutting verge grass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Welland Lodge Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain blocked for 3 months, 9th June
item.description:
I see you say the drain was cleared on 7 May. It obviously wasn’t. For clarity, this drain is in Brighton Road and not Hewlett Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Hewlett Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 9th June
item.description:
Overgrown Hedge FW 10m x 1m Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Clear from CW (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose / raised kerb stone - tripping hazard, 9th June
item.description:
The pavement kerb outside 'The Bakery' house on Upper Bath Street is raised and presents a very dangerous tripping hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Bath Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Degraded road repair with holes, 9th June
item.description:
This damage has been deemed as repaired but having ridden past it today it remains dangerous to cyclists. To reiterate it is still falling apart and is under a bridge and thus cannot be seen before hitting it. I do not understand why this is considered safe. This has been a problem for an extended petiod of time and has not been resolved.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
